text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober has injured herself during training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ow! How can it hurt this much?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why was I so stupid? I shouldn't have
pushed myself so hard...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And the worst part is, I won't be able to run for a
while...
choice_data_list: Let's just focus on healing up.
We'll make up for it once you're better!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I know. Not like I could do much even if I
wanted to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, enough talk. I'll rest up, so you can go
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worrying you. I'm going to get some
rest, so you can get back to work now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober looks miserable as she fights
against her pain and frustration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Believe me, I'm planning to make up
for this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll get better little by little and return to training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I barely even moved... Just how long is this
going to take to heal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober looks beyond devastated when she
realizes how severe and persistent her pain is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I need to stay optimistic. This could be a good
learning experience!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, since I can't move at all, can you give
lectures instead?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That way, when I'm all recovered, I'll be better
equipped to make up for lost time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober makes the most out of her
convalescence, and afterwards seems to have
discovered something new!
